title: T&A Explore
description: A pack with exploration content, as well as things like Create for automation.
body:
![T&A Explore](https://tk-pix.s3.af-south-1.amazonaws.com/name.png)

The main designer of this modpack is my 11-year-old child. They have come up with an interesting combination of mods to allow for the exploring, building or even automation play style.

A lot of exploration content, as well as things like Create for automation.

- Explore beautiful biomes
- Discover interesting structures
- Explore beautiful villages
- Play as any creature you have met (and killed) before, just keep an eye out for the sun if you want to be a zombie or skeleton
- Build, build, build with a whole bunch of cool building mods
- Make stuff even more beautiful by adding shaders (any shaders compatible with Iris will work, which is almost all of them)
- Store stuff efficiently
- Automate almost anything with Create

The latest version is 3.1.0, which is not backward compatible with worlds created with version 2 of the pack. The reason for this is mainly because we've upped Minecraft to 1.20.1 and some of the mods we used in version 2 are not available for Minecraft 1.20 and up.

### Links
Everything in this pack comes off Modrinth, apart from the following:

- [Dank Storage](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dank-storage) from Curseforge
- [MiniHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud) from Curseforge
- Assorted resource and data packs from [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net)
